inputs.label: Tracker CSV path
inputs.description: Path to the tracker.csv file that tracks build progress

inputs.label: Roles directory
inputs.description: Where role files are created (ROLE.md, role.json, manifest.json)

inputs.label: Plans directory
inputs.description: Where detailed build plans are stored

inputs.label: Reference directory
inputs.description: Where reference repos are stored for methodology inspiration

inputs.label: Role authoring guide path
inputs.description: Path to the ROLE_AUTHORING.md spec that defines canonical role format

build-cycle.description: Every 30 minutes: read tracker, find next item, execute phase, update tracker

activities.intent: Read the tracker CSV and identify the next item to work on based on priority order
steps: Find items with status PENDING (prioritize foundation skills first)
If no PENDING, find items with status FAIL in phase 3-FIX
If no FAIL, find items with status PASS ready to advance
If ALL items are COMPLETE, report build is done and stop
Select ONE item to work on this cycle

activities.intent: Execute the appropriate phase (DRAFT, EVALUATE, FIX, or FINAL) for the selected item
steps: Read the master plan at /Users/almatuck/workspaces/nebo/skills/PLAN.md for conventions
Read the master list at /Users/almatuck/workspaces/nebo/skills/SKILL_LIST.md for specifications
If a detailed plan exists in plans/ for this item's role, read it for skill specifications
Read the relevant reference material from .reference/ for methodology inspiration
Execute the phase: DRAFT (create files), EVALUATE (check criteria), FIX (resolve issues), or FINAL (last check)
For DRAFT: create the SKILL.md or ROLE.md + role.json + manifest.json
For EVALUATE: check all criteria from ROLE.md checklist, record issues
For FIX: read issues, fix each one, clear issues
For FINAL: one last check, set COMPLETE or back to FIX

activities.intent: Update the tracker CSV with the results of this cycle
steps: Update the row for the item worked on: new phase, new status, issues (if any), timestamp
Report what was done this cycle
